product: GitLab REST API v4 — projects listing

auth.note: required on every request, including redirect follow-ups; never included in error text

success.next_page: Link response header, entry with rel="next"; the URL (which carries id_after=<last id>) must be requested VERBATIM, never rebuilt
success.end_of_collection: Link header absent and the resulting array is empty
x-next-page is empty on the final page

body.message: This resource has been moved permanently to <new url>

moved_resource.client_rule: use the endpoint from the Location header; follow-ups stay authenticated; hops are bounded

null_booleans.rule: some boolean fields can be null; a null boolean has no default value and is neither true nor false. Inventory output must keep null distinct from false (JSON null in rows, counted as 'unknown' in summaries).
